rationale: Elec. Code §274.002 governs the procedural drawing for ballot order among multiple constitutional amendment propositions. It has no bearing on the substance of the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: If more than one proposed constitutional amendment is to be submitted in an election, the order of the propositions submitting the amendments shall be determined by a drawing as provided by this section.
_note: No conflict. This election procedure rule is tangentially relevant only if the proposed change is enacted via constitutional amendment appearing on a ballot with other propositions, but it does not impede or conflict with the substantive change.
